transcript.text: You know, it's a work heads down day today and tomorrow, so I wasn't sure if everyone joined.
Struggle to find a booth in the office.
Is that a hand-drawn map in the background?
It's been there for a long time.
I'll do some detective work, but it's literally, like, it's gorgeous, right?
Well, now, like, I'm still there to erase it.
Oh, you're sitting next to each other.
So you're coming out of Sarah's computer.
Well, thank you all for joining.
I've added everyone to the agenda.
uh, before we dive into the content updates, I wanted to ask if there's anything that's top of mind for you that you wanted to talk about before we dive in.
I think just getting into the content updates is helpful.

I haven't had a chance to dig through all of those ones that you sent over, but I was just peeking at the refreshes right before this, as well as the ones that you had said were basically ready to go.
Yeah, so in terms of the content content updates...
So it's actually way easier if I just show you in the content OS.
So these are the blogs that are ready to publish.
We've filed a ticket with our publisher.
They're going to go and stage this and ghost.
And then we have five that are currently being reviewed.
So there are two refreshes, three new pieces of content.
And we are also working on six new blogs this week that we'll deliver by the end of this week.
So that should make 20 blogs in total.
And then we're going to deliver those to you also by the end of the week.
Um, I didn't get a chance to fully dig into the like refreshes, but I saw that most of it is like.
Is like what changed just the green highlighted text?
I just want to make sure that I'm not like rereading a blog that mostly didn't change.
I just want to like be looking at most of the updates.
So the green highlight is it's like anything that's highlighted is new.
That's what I thought, but I didn't get a chance to fully dig in and I just wanted to clarify.
And yeah, I think those are all of the updates on the content side for we're going to have Alice put together a Google Drive folder with all of the artifacts, like the content OS.
So all of that's going to be in a Google Drive folder that you can download.
And yeah, I think those are all the updates that I had.
I think we'll probably have our writer, Annette.
Give some, like, similar editorial feedback as last time.
Maybe we'll, maybe me and her will split it.
I don't have an exact timeline for that.
She should be around because she's Europe-based next week, but we're obviously off end of the week next week.
So also, so this is week eight.
So we just also wanted to chime in on how that works.
I want to see, like, what the timeline for, like, finishing that up was.
Like, what do you need from us and when, basically?
So I'm going to be here.
So I'm also based in Europe.
I'm going to be working next week, except for Tuesday.
So if she's, if she reviews anything next week, I can go back in and implement the feedback.
Any other updates on your end, Erik?
I think, so I told Scott, we are having our geo specialist.

Let's just comprehensively address those questions specific to the site issues, so we should have that for you tomorrow, and then the full kind of deliverables that we had in the SoW will be packaged up in that final download for ContentOS, artifacts, kind of the Notion space, et cetera.
So planning to just cover off on our to-do lists and get that wrapped up by tomorrow.
Can you guys hear me okay?
think I'm just like relying on Sara's mic.
Is that going to also include the thoughts on like Reddit and et cetera, like that kind of like more comprehensive?
Yeah, I think for it was Reddit, YouTube, Social.
For social, I think we're keying on mainly on LinkedIn and not like the Instagram.
think if you guys want perspective on that, we can kind of put in high-level highlights, but that's not something that we typically focus on with any of our clients.
So don't have any real insights there outside of what we would probably find that you guys would find on Google or ChatTQT.

I think the one insight that we have from working with, you the lovables and other AI app dev creators is that they're just really focused on user-generated content and kind of how do they use that across different channels to just boost how other people talk about it, kind of the social proof aspect.
But yes, overall, we will have that feedback and kind of high-level recommendations for Reddit, YouTube, and then LinkedIn specifically.
All right, I think if that's it, we could probably wrap this up early, unless you have anything else you want to talk about?
Do you have anything else, Phoebe?
If we're going to, if that final, sorry, I lost my Zoom window there.
But if that, if that final export's going to, like, have that check, checks of the outstanding stuff that was in the SoW, then I think that that's, and that sounds good to me.
Well, yeah, thank you so much for your time and these eight weeks and all the time and effort you've put into reviewing the content and everything.
And you all were really great to work with.
So wishing you the best of luck for everything that you do moving forward.
Yeah, we, I, I, like, I'm really grateful for the work that you guys did.
You, like, this, this strategy sprint, even though.

It really helped us figure out exactly what our internal needs are, but also really just gave us a foundation to build on going forward in terms of validated query strategy and content buckets and just starting to understand what we should be tracking.
And that is just super valuable.
So I am really grateful for you two and your hard work and the rest of the team.
Thank the, your designer for us too, specifically for her work, because that's also been really helpful for our team to like start to see what's possible with some of these models.
So yeah, it's been a good eight weeks and I'm just grateful for all the work.
Well, yeah, we'll be in touch about the remaining deliverables.
And again, I'll be available next week to do any like last minute edits to the content.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Final project sync to review content status and confirm deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** 20 blogs are in progress, with 5 in review and 6 new pieces due EOW. A ticket is filed to stage the first batch of ready-to-publish blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Final Deliverables:** GrowthX will deliver all remaining SoW items by tomorrow, Nov 21, including site issue analysis and recommendations for Reddit, YouTube, and LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Feedback Plan:** Bubble will provide editorial feedback next week. GrowthX will implement edits, as Aida is available (except Tuesday) while Bubble is on holiday.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Project Success:** Bubble confirmed the 8-week sprint successfully provided a critical foundation: a validated query strategy, defined content buckets, and clear tracking metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

## Topics

### Final Deliverables & Strategy

  - [GrowthX will deliver all remaining SoW items by tomorrow, Nov 21.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Package includes:**](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Comprehensive site issue analysis from a geo specialist.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Full download of all project artifacts (Content OS, Notion space).](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [High-level recommendations for Reddit, YouTube, and LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Social Media Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**LinkedIn:** Primary focus.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Instagram/TikTok:** Not a GrowthX specialty; recommendations will be high-level.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Key Insight:** AI app dev creators (e.g., "lovables") succeed by leveraging user-generated content (UGC) for social proof.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Content Pipeline & Feedback

  - [**Status:** 20 blogs are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [**Ready to Publish:** Ticket filed for staging in Ghost.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [**In Review:** 5 blogs (2 refreshes, 3 new).](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [**In Progress:** 6 new blogs due EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Bubble writer Annette will provide editorial feedback next week, splitting the task with Sara.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Clarification:** Green highlights in refreshes indicate new text, simplifying the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Aida is available next week (except Tuesday) to implement edits while Bubble is on holiday.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

### Project Wrap-up & Appreciation

  - [Bubble confirmed the 8-week sprint provided a critical foundation for future work.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Key Outcomes:**](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [Validated query strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [Defined content buckets.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [Clear tracking metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Bubble specifically thanked the GrowthX designer for work that helped the team visualize possibilities with AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Deliver all remaining SoW items by Nov 21.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Bubble:** Provide editorial feedback on content next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Aida (GrowthX):** Implement feedback next week (available except Tuesday).](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

action_items.description: Deliver 6 new blogs to Sara/Scott by Nov 21
Create Drive folder w/ Content OS + artifacts for Sara/Scott by Nov 21
Submit geo-specialist site-issue responses to Scott by Nov 21
